name: @ganaweb/config
description: Shared TypeScript base + React + Biome preset for the ganaweb monorepo.

scripts.typecheck: find . -maxdepth 2 -name 'tsconfig.json' 2>/dev/null | grep -q . && tsc --noEmit || echo 'PR1 stub: no tsconfig to typecheck'
scripts.ci: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run lint
